html:
Exclusive to:  

The Breezy Vest is a wearable Dress Item. It requires 1 Koalefant Trunk and 8 Silk to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. A Sewing Kit repairs 33.3% of its Durability. It restores 2 Sanity/min while worn.

It is a tier 1 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 60.

Downloadable Content

In all DLCs, the Breezy Vest provides 20% protection from Wetness during Rain.

Trivia

  • The Breezy Vest was added in the Progress! update.
  • The Puffy Vest is the Winter counterpart to the Breezy Vest.
  • The Breezy Vest is equal in insulation to the Dapper Vest; the latter restores sanity faster but it has less durability.
  • While the Breezy Vest provides protection from Wetness in rain, the Puffy Vest does not.

Assets

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Wilson wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Willow wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Wendy wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • WX-78 wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Woodie wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Wes wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Maxwell wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Webber wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Walani wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Warly wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Wilbur wearing a Breezy Vest.

  • Wilba wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Wormwood wearing a Breezy Vest.

  • Winona wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Wortox wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Wurt wearing a Breezy Vest.
  • Breezy Vest as seen in the poster for the Progress! update.

Exclusive to:
“Wilderness casual.”
–Wilson
“Now I'll be with my friend forever.”
–Willow
“Is warm fuzzy nose.”
–Wolfgang
“Skin to wear on my skin.”
–Wendy
“TEMPERATURE CONTROL HOUSING”
–WX-78
“Durable outerwear.”
–Wickerbottom
“Nice and breezy.”
–Woodie
“It's more of a fall vest.”
–Maxwell
“Allows for proper air convection.”
–Wagstaff
“It will nöt suffice in the frözen wastes.”
–Wigfrid
“It's so puffy!”
–Webber
“Lets my skin breath.”
–Walani
“Fashionably refreshing.”
–Warly

–Woodlegs
“WILBA LIKETH VESTS”
–Wilba
“Cool”
–Wormwood
“Now I'm only slightly freezing cold.”
–Wheeler
“They weren't kidding about the breeze.”
–Winona
“It's my very best vest!”
–Wortox
“Wearing a nose!”
–Wurt
“Now we're both fuzzy, Woby!”
–Walter
“Quite cozy.”
–Wanda
The Breezy Vest is a wearable Dress Item. It requires 1 Koalefant Trunk and 8 Silk to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. A Sewing Kit repairs 33.3% of its Durability. It restores 2 Sanity/min while worn.
It is a tier 1 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 60.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In all DLCs, the Breezy Vest provides 20% protection from Wetness during Rain.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Breezy Vest was added in the Progress! update.
The Puffy Vest is the Winter counterpart to the Breezy Vest.
The Breezy Vest is equal in insulation to the Dapper Vest; the latter restores sanity faster but it has less durability.
While the Breezy Vest provides protection from Wetness in rain, the Puffy Vest does not.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Áo Vest Nhẹ Nhàng là một trang phục có thể mặc được. Nó cần 1 Thân Gấu Túi và 8 Tơ để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 33,3% độ bền của nó. Nó phục hồi 2 Tinh Thần/phút khi đeo.

A [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 33.3% of its [[Durability]]. It restores 2 [[Sanity]]/min while worn. It is a ''tier 1'' warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the [[Winter]] before [[Freezing]]. It has an [[Freezing#Mechanics|insulation factor]] of 60. == {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content == In all [[DLC]]s, the Breezy Vest provides 20% protection from [[Wetness]] during [[Rain]]. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Breezy Vest was added in the ''[[Version History#Progress!|Progress!]]'' update. * The [[Puffy Vest]] is the [[Winter]] counterpart to the Breezy Vest. * The Breezy Vest is equal in insulation to the [[Dapper Vest]]; the latter restores sanity faster but it has less durability. * While the Breezy Vest provides protection from Wetness in rain, the Puffy Vest does not. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Breezy Vest Dropped.png|Dropped Breezy Vest Equipped.png|Equipped == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == CD trunkvest_summer.png|Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from [[CD Don't Starve]].
